description_long: This is a medium-sized motor yacht with a white hull and blue accents, featuring a prominent upper deck covered by a dark blue canopy. The boat has a spacious main deck with wooden trim, large windows along the sides, and a rear swim platform with steps leading up to the main area. The bow is slightly raised and pointed, with railings and a hatch visible on the foredeck. The upper flybridge is accessible and includes seating and navigation equipment, protected by the canopy. The vessel appears to be constructed primarily from fiberglass and wood, with metal railings and glass windows, and is designed for leisure cruising or urban marina environments.
description: A white and blue motor yacht with a covered upper deck, wooden trim, and large side windows, designed for leisure cruising.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed bow, railings, and the dark blue canopy over the upper deck.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the length of the hull, large windows, wooden trim, and the upper deck canopy.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swim platform, steps, and the open main deck area with canopy above.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the hull, windows, and access points similar to the other side.
